title: Spear <1.21.11 displayer
description: Adds Custom Model Data for a Diamond Spear
body:
## Diamond Spear for Custom Plugins
This can be used for custom spear plugins (or if you just want a sword with a spear texture)

If you get a Sword with a custom model data value over 1 it will turn into a Spear (Left Hand is Bugged Right now)

## Features
Different Texture while in hand, in the hotbar or on the ground and in 3rd person.
Adds custom Spear sounds, can be played using the /playsound spear.SOUND command
![Textures in Hand and in Hotbar (NEW)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f18550a37eb43f37dfd5b7c07f7c873192592ea0.png)
![3rd Person view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e647fc25d2c26efa82b39bff81a26a3fe1448abe.png)
![Texture on the Ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd2d1d21021d03b018015018be8da7fa633b9b8d.png)
